# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new behavior or target
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — skill/content or docs only
- [ ] refactor / chore / build / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` (`node --test`) passes
- [ ] If the skill changed, the `adapters/` surfaces were regenerated
      (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The Opal scripting API described is accurate — no invented methods
- [ ] No machine paths (`C:\Users\...`), tokens, or account IDs added
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
